Plumber with exceptional jumping skills. Extensive experience in reptile management, mushroom consumption, and rescuing kidnapped royalty. Can perform actual plumbing work, but usually busy stomping turtles.

Silent hero dressed in a green tunic. Proficient in breaking people's pottery, collecting glowing triangles, and saving the princess (who usually gets the title of the game instead of me). Excellent sword fighting and boomerang skills.

Master builder and survivor. Skills include: Punching trees with bare hands to get wood, building mansions out of dirt, and surviving explosive green monsters. Highly experienced in mining at night (despite advice against it).

Professional runner. Extremely fast-paced. Specializes in collecting gold rings, spin-dashing robots, and stopping a mad scientist with a ridiculous mustache. Major weaknesses: spikes and drowning after 10 seconds in water.
Animal trainer and battler. Left home at age 10 to travel the world, capture wild creatures inside tiny balls, and force them to fight others for gym badges. Aiming to catch 'em all.
Professional maze navigator and competitive eater. Capable of consuming large quantities of dots and fruit while outsmarting four brightly colored ghosts. Only goes 'Waka Waka' all day.

Space marine. Highly motivated self-starter with a passion for ripping and tearing demons on Mars. Expertise with shotguns, chainsaws, and the BFG. Communication skills limited to aggressive grunting.

Experienced in 'borrowing' vehicles of all types, evading a 5-star police presence, and causing general mayhem. Strong background in questionable business ventures, bank heists, and playing golf on weekends.

Space bean. Highly observant. Excellent at completing mundane tasks like swiping cards and fixing wires, while constantly trying to figure out which coworker is an alien shapeshifter trying to eliminate everyone. Very suspicious.

Island representative. Heavy experience in picking fruit, catching bugs, and paying off massive, never-ending mortgages to a very entrepreneurial raccoon. Excellent at interior design and talking to animal neighbors.

Super soldier. Dedicated to fighting alien armadas, stopping intergalactic parasites, and occasionally flipping heavy vehicles back on their wheels. Never takes helmet off. AI companion is always in my head giving me directions.

Lab test subject. Highly skilled in solving spatial puzzles using a gun that shoots two linked holes. Comfortable with passive-aggressive AI, deadly lasers, and the promise of cake (even if it's a lie).

Wealthy archaeologist and explorer. Specializes in exploring ancient ruins, dodging deadly traps, and fighting off wildlife with dual pistols. Expert in gymnastics and collecting artifacts that belong in a museum.
Historical stealth expert. Specializes in wearing a hood, blending into crowds, and leaping off ridiculously high towers into small piles of hay without injury. Hidden blade proficiency is a must.

Average citizen capable of getting a promotion, catching a house on fire while making cereal, and swimming in pools (unless the ladder suddenly disappears, in which case I will panic and drown). Communicates exclusively in gibberish.
